meta.tagline: I enjoy working with businesses and creative individuals.
meta.aboutBio:
Hi, I am Dagmawi Top Rated Freelance wordpress developer, wordpress designer, wordpress website, wordpress elementor, wordpress website design, wordpress specialist, Elementor , Elementor Pro | Helping Businesses Build Modern and High-Converting Websites.  

I have delivered Multiple sites that load under 3 seconds, and improved conversion rates by up to 40% for clients via landing pages built with Elementor.   

I am a WordPress and Elementor Pro developer with 3+ years of experience and Multiple websites delivered for clients worldwide. I specialize in building websites that are fast, mobile-responsive, SEO-friendly, and easy to manage.   What I can do for you:  Custom WordPress development (themes, child themes, plugin setup)  Elementor Pro website & landing page design (pixel-perfect, advanced widgets, animations)  WooCommerce store setup & customization (secure checkout, product pages, payment gateways)  Website redesigns & bug fixes Performance optimization (speed, security, SEO structure)   Why clients hire me:  Proven track record with 100% happy clients  Rising Talent status on Upwork (trusted by businesses worldwide)  Clear communication and fast response time  websites that load quickly, convert better, and scale easily  I don't just build websites, I create professional online platforms that grow your business. If you're looking for a reliable WordPress & Elementor expert who can deliver high-quality results, let's connect and make your project a success.   

My Core Services Include:  Custom WordPress Website Design with Elementor  Full Website Redesigns using Elementor Pro/Free  WordPress WooCommerce Development and eCommerce integration  WordPress plugin development & WordPress theme development  WordPress landing page design & responsive layouts  Ongoing WordPress maintenance, WordPress SEO, and WordPress website optimization   

If you're looking for a skilled WordPress Developer who delivers high-quality results in WordPress customization, WordPress migration, and complete cms development, let's connect. I'm ready to discuss your project and help you achieve your business goals.
meta.specialization: Specializing in fast, mobile-responsive, SEO-friendly websites that drive results.
